There are several other pieces of -- this is not an evidence Your Honor, this was for identification only but it is down here in this -- in the archives and I just want to point out that this one of the things that we've been going into today that that we never had trial on. I don't consider this part of the record. I considered it improper for Adkins to say he wasn't represented by legal counsel when things that were excluded from the evidence show that he was.

turns.name: JUSTICE BLACK
turns.text: What you're arguing is that if that is irrelevant fact it is not in this record as shown to be of fact.

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: That is correct Your Honor. But it was stated as a fact this morning that's why I'm bringing it up. Now, another point I would like to discuss is --

turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE WARREN
turns.text: Who conducted the negotiations, who conducted the negotiation day by day? I understood him to say that it was about three years that took to bring about this agreement. Now, who from day to day negotiated on each side was --

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: You'll find nothing in the record that clarifies that for the Court and I simply feel.

turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE WARREN
turns.text: But it embarrass it much I would think on the -- on whether he is represented by counsel or not as this statement that you put in the record now that wasn't in the record, that's the reason I asked you.

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: Yes. Well, Your Honor we were not permitted to go into that. There simply no record on it.

turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE WARREN
turns.text: And you have no idea?

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: Well, I have some idea but I don't believe it's proper for me to tell the Court my ideas. I think we're here on the record.

turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE WARREN
turns.text: You've told us what isn't in the record there.

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: Well, I gave you this as an example to show we're discussing things this morning that aren't before the Court.

turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE WARREN
turns.text: Well, why don't you give us the rest of it then?

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: Alright. Your Honor, Adkins was an employee of Lear. He would go to Lear from time to time and discuss this. There wasn't any hurry about this agreement. They were negotiating it arguing back and forth and this was a very leisurely thing. He dropped in and chat about it and go away and say, I'll talk to my lawyer about it. Three months later, he'd come back and say something else and it was just that sort of thing.

turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE WARREN
turns.text: Just an employee dealing with an --

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: Yes. Yes, Your Honor.

turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE WARREN
turns.text: -- employer involving what admittance.

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: Yes, Your Honor. Now, another thing much of the argument today has been based upon the discussion of these idea, discoveries, and inventions apart from patent rights. Well, again, the record shows that this issue was eliminated at the outset of this action and no evidence was permitted on this. We're talking about things that we don't have the record on. We simply we're not permitted to go in to this sort of thing.

turns.name: JUSTICE FORTAS
turns.text: Well, is the one page agreement to which Mr. Cohen referred in the record?

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: No sir, Your Honor it has the same status in the record as this document I've just read it to the Court. The one page agreement is reprinted as the very last document in the big appendix. It was never admitted.

turns.name: JUSTICE FORTAS
turns.text: Was that reprinted by stipulation to you counsel?

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: Mr. Adkins designated for inclusion in the record if you will notice we say exhibit 7 for identification only. This document was never admitted and the reason it was never admitted is the trial court said, we're going to trial on the agreement of exhibit 8 and nothing else is material, nothing else is permitted.

turns.name: JUSTICE BLACK
turns.text: When you've been saying it's not in the record, do you mean it's not in the record that submitted to us for how consideration or if that's what you mean, how could you say it is here on the bottom, that U exhibit that you're talking about? How did you, you said exhibit U is share in some things.

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: Yes.

turns.name: JUSTICE BLACK
turns.text: In this Court?

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: Yes. Yes, Your Honor.

turns.name: JUSTICE BLACK
turns.text: Well, it was often you say but was not admitted in evidence?

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: Yes, Your Honor.

turns.name: JUSTICE BLACK
turns.text: That's what you mean when you say it's not in the record?

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: Yes, Your Honor.

turns.name: JUSTICE BLACK
turns.text: On each on of them?

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: Yes, Your Honor. We were never permitted to develop a record of any kind going -- leading of the thing -- leading up to the consummation of this agreement.

turns.name: JUSTICE FORTAS
turns.text: I don't believe that one page -- my question may not have been clear. I don't believe that one page document to which you referred is the one page document to which Mr. Cohen referred --

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: Yes, sir.

turns.name: JUSTICE FORTAS
turns.text: I thought he referred to a one page agreement between Lear and Adkins with respect to inventions --

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: That's --

turns.name: JUSTICE FORTAS
turns.text: -- which --

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: I think we're both referring to the same thing Your Honor --

turns.name: JUSTICE FORTAS
turns.text: The same document?

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: Would you so agree Mr. Cohen that we're referring – he's referring to the pleadings and I'm referring to the exhibits.

turns.name: JUSTICE FORTAS
turns.text: I see, thank you.

turns.name: PETER R. COHEN
turns.text: Because I'm referring to exhibit A attached to the complaint which is the same document and which was admitted in the answer. Well, it's incorrect to that extent.

turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE WARREN
turns.text: Was submitted in the record?

turns.name: PETER R. COHEN
turns.text: Oh! Yes, it's in the record because it attached the complaint and the answer admits that the party signed this agreement.

turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE WARREN
turns.text: Yes.

turns.name: JUSTICE BLACK
turns.text: Well, was admitted as evidence?

turns.name: PETER R. COHEN
turns.text: No, it was admitted --

turns.name: JUSTICE BLACK
turns.text: Or admitted for identification only?

turns.name: PETER R. COHEN
turns.text: It was admitted for identification only.

turns.name: JUSTICE BLACK
turns.text: So, it is not in the record here we have considered it?

turns.name: PETER R. COHEN
turns.text: Yes. You can consider it because it was --

turns.name: JUSTICE BLACK
turns.text: Consider it for what?

turns.name: PETER R. COHEN
turns.text: -- to the complaint as an exhibit and the --

turns.name: JUSTICE BLACK
turns.text: That was offered that's not admitted?

turns.name: PETER R. COHEN
turns.text: Well, in California you do not have to offer something into evidence which is admitted once it is admitted in the answer --

turns.name: JUSTICE BLACK
turns.text: But it might be admissible and relevant that it might not, did the Court hold that was admitted as a relevant piece of evidence?

turns.name: PETER R. COHEN
turns.text: No, it did not because I was trying to get to another subject with it but in the answer it was admitted that Lear had signed this agreement and the California Supreme Court in fact considered it in its opinion.

turns.name: JUSTICE STEWART
turns.text: It's on page 11 of appendix, volume 1 and it is exhibit 1 to the complaint that was filed and as I understand it the answer did not deny that part of the allegations of the complaint?

turns.name: PETER R. COHEN
turns.text: That's correct.

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: No, that's beyond question Your Honor but the trial court excluded it because license agreement, paragraph 13 of the license agreement says, this agreement supersedes and cancels the agreement which has been brought.

turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE WARREN
turns.text: Very well.

turns.name: C. RUSSELL HALE
turns.text: Thank you Your Honor.
